title: Why was Jack Doherty placed under house arrest? Controversial streamer sparks backlash with ankle monitor video
summary_full: Jack Doherty claimed he was placed under house arrest after posting a video showing an ankle monitor and saying he must stay home for the next few months. The update sparked major backlash online, with critics mocking the controversial streamer over his past behavior and legal troubles. Doherty was previously arrested in Florida on drug-related charges and later faced a PGA Tour ban after allegedly trespassing and disrupting an event.
